title: The Raid Erupts Across Onigashima
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Luffy, Momonosuke, Orochi, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11 as The raid erupts across Onigashima as Yamato protects Momonosuke, the Scabbards strike Kaido, and the alliance throws the banquet into war.
scene: The raid erupts across Onigashima as Yamato protects Momonosuke, the Scabbards strike Kaido, and the alliance throws the banquet into war.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The man who carries this country on his shoulders..

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Who will become the pirate King!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hm? You wanna know the meaning of your name?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am the one who will become...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: father... Mother... when I'll join you...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can finally look at you, face to face!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hiyori... I was hopping I'd see you atleast once.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't want to die....!! I don't want to cry...!! A Warrior...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: mustn't cry infront of others, that is embarrassing

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: You really were going to kill me!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You are not my father anymore at all!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: The decisive battle is about to start!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Where the hell did they come from?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Those are the MINK RULERS!! They were alive!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Onigashima Raid Erupts storyline with 39 dialogue beats. The raid erupts across Onigashima as Yamato protects Momonosuke, the Scabbards strike Kaido, and the alliance throws the banquet into war.
